name: Can AEO be used against pro se defendants?
description: **Courts modify for pro se.** Motion wins.[4]

mainEntity.name: Can AEO be used against pro se defendants?

acceptedAnswer.text: **Courts modify for pro se.** Motion wins.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, but courts grant access motions routinely.** Equity demands it.[4] Key factors: Prove prejudice. Simple motion suffices. No publication promise. Common ruling.
